Category Count Examples Ticketing Integrations ~25 Jira (OAuth, issues, templates, insight objects), GitLab issues, ServiceNow (OAuth), WHD Executive Reports ~14 Report CRUD, templates, download, regenerate, clone, custom logo Notifications ~8 Notification center, notification logs, mark as read Analytics ~5 Analytics CRUD, data collection, clone 2FA ~5 QR code, request, confirm, disable User Management ~5 Users CRUD, filter, list usernames, disable2fa Planner (Projects/Tasks) ~7 Projects CRUD, project tasks Tags ~5 Tags, host tags, service tags, set_tags on hosts/services/vulns Duplicate Management ~4 Associate, disassociate, mark as main, list duplicates Enrichment ~2 Vulnerability enrichment, Vulners exploits LDAP/SAML/SMTP Settings ~6 settings/ldap, settings/saml, settings/smtp, settings/notifications, settings/vulnerabilities, settings/enrichment Miscellaneous ~10 whoami, logo, logs, most_used_tools, vulns-threadfix, slack_token, etc.

docs.title: 2.4 Common Endpoints (Normalized)
docs.text: After adjusting for the /_api prefix difference, roughly 97 path patterns exist in both specs, covering core CRUD operations for: - Agents, Agent Schedules, Jobs, Tasks, Pipelines - Workspaces, Hosts (workspaced), Services (workspaced), Vulnerabilities (workspaced) - Commands, Comments, Credentials, Bulk Create - Custom Fields Schema, Search Filters, Licenses - Token, Info, Preferences, Swagger, Export Data - Vulnerability Templates, Activities, Websocket Token

docs.text: Action, Agent, Agent Schedule, AgentsSchedule, Bulk, Command, Comment, Credential, CustomFieldsSchema, File, Filter, Host, Informational, Job, License, Pipeline, SearchFilter, Service, Swagger, Token, User, Vulnerability, VulnerabilityGeneric, VulnerabilityTemplate, Workflow, Workspace, settings

docs.title: 3.2 Tags Only in Codebase Spec

docs.title: 3.3 Tags Only in Wiki Spec (Enterprise)

docs.title: 4.1 Component Schemas Count
docs.text: Spec Schema Count Codebase (5.17.0) 35 Wiki (5.10.0) 51

docs.title: 4.2 Schemas Only in Codebase Spec

All 38 API modules (exceeding the 30+ requirement) are represented in the codebase 5.17.0 spec:

Coverage: 38/38 modules (100%)

docs.title: 6. Endpoints in Code but Missing from Spec
docs.text:
These endpoints are registered in the codebase but absent from the 5.17.0 OpenAPI spec:

# Endpoint Source Category 1 POST /_api/login Flask-Security Authentication 2 POST /_api/logout Flask-Security Authentication 3 GET/POST /_api/change Flask-Security Password change 4 GET/POST /_api/reset Flask-Security Password reset 5 POST /v3/agents (no /_api prefix) agent.py Agent self-registration (public) 6 POST /v3/ws/<ws>/comment_unique comments.py Deduplicated comment creation 7 POST /v3/ws/<ws>/credential/import_csv credentials.py CSV credential import

Note: The spec includes empty path definitions for /_api/login, /_api/logout, /_api/change, and /_api/verify (no HTTP methods defined), indicating they were placeholder entries. The Flask-Security auth endpoints should be fully documented.

docs.title: 7.1 Immediate — Update Published Spec
docs.text:
1. Replace the wiki faraday_swagger.json with the 5.17.0 codebase spec
  2. Source: repos/faraday-gitlab/faraday/openapi/faraday_swagger.json
  3. Target: repos/faraday-wiki/docs/files/faraday_swagger.json

  4. This immediately brings the Swagger UI from 5.10.0 to 5.17.0

  5. Remove all references to api.faradaysec.com across documentation

  6. Domain is defunct (NXDOMAIN / ECONNREFUSED)

  7. Redirect users to docs.faradaysec.com/api-swagger/

  8. Update the wiki api-swagger.md page to note the spec version

docs.title: 7.2 Short-Term — Enrich the Spec
docs.text:
1. Add Flask-Security auth endpoints to the spec with proper request/response schemas
  2. Add the public agent registration endpoint (POST /v3/agents without /_api)
  3. Add credential/import_csv endpoint to the spec
  4. Mark deprecated endpoints (deprecated: true) for skipped routes

docs.title: 7.3 Medium-Term — Automation
docs.text:
1. Set up CI pipeline to auto-export and publish the spec on each release
  2. Reconcile enterprise vs community endpoints — consider maintaining separate spec files
  3. Update to 5.19.0 when spec is regenerated from the latest codebase

docs.title: 8. Updated Spec
docs.text:
The 5.17.0 codebase spec has been copied to output/docs/api/faraday_swagger.json as the recommended replacement for the outdated wiki version.

All 38 API modules are represented in the 5.17.0 spec, covering 136 paths with 232 endpoint definitions across 29 tags and 35 component schemas.

docs.title: 9. Supporting Files
docs.text: File Description output/docs/api/faraday_swagger.json Updated spec (5.17.0, copied from codebase) output/docs/api/openapi-spec-audit.md This report inventory/audit-api-gaps.md Phase 03 gap audit (detailed findings) autorun/Working/swagger-endpoints.md Full 237-endpoint reference from 5.17.0 spec autorun/Working/code-api-routes.md Source-code route extraction (38 view classes) autorun/Working/docs-api-endpoints.md Public docs endpoint extraction

docs.title: Pipelines, Jobs & Tasks API
docs.text:
API Version: v3 Spec Version: Faraday 5.10.0 Base URL: https://localhost:5985 Authentication: Cookie-based session or API token (Authorization: Token <token>) Content-Type: application/json

The Pipelines, Jobs & Tasks API provides Faraday's workflow automation engine. It allows users to define automated actions that execute when vulnerability data matches specified conditions. The three resources form a hierarchy: Pipelines orchestrate ordered sequences of Jobs, each Job evaluates Conditions against a data model and, when matched, executes one or more Tasks (atomic actions such as updating a field).

docs.title: Table of Contents
docs.text:
• Workflow Concepts
  • Schemas
  • Pipeline Schema
  • Job Schema
  • Task Schema
  • WorkflowExecution Schema
  • Condition Schema
  • Pipeline Endpoints

  • Create Pipeline
  • Get Pipeline
  • Full Update Pipeline
  • Partial Update Pipeline

  • Get Job Executions
  • Get Job Tasks
  • Get Job Conditions
  • Check Job Enabled
  • Export Job
  • Import Job
  • Get Rule Attributes
  • Clone Job
  • Task Endpoints

  • Get Task Fields

docs.title: Workflow Concepts
docs.text:
Faraday's workflow automation engine lets you define rules that automatically act on vulnerability data. The system follows a three-tier hierarchy:

Pipeline
  |
  +-- Job 1 (conditions: severity == "critical" AND confirmed == false)
  |     +-- Task A: SET confirmed = true
  |     +-- Task B: SET status = "open"
  |
  +-- Job 2 (conditions: severity == "info")
        +-- Task C: SET status = "closed"

docs.title: Pipeline
docs.text: A Pipeline is the top-level container that groups and orders a sequence of Jobs. Pipelines can be enabled/disabled, run on demand, exported, and cloned. Each pipeline is scoped to a workspace and defines jobs_order to control execution sequence.

docs.title: Job
docs.text:
A Job defines what to match and what to do. Each Job targets a specific data model (e.g., "vulnerability") and contains:

  • Conditions/Rules (rules_json): A structured condition tree that determines which objects the job applies to. Conditions can be nested using logical operators (AND, OR) and support comparison operators against object fields (e.g., severity == "critical").
  • Tasks (tasks_ids): An ordered list of Task references that execute when conditions match.

Jobs can belong to multiple Pipelines. They track execution history via WorkflowExecution records.

docs.title: Task
docs.text: A Task is the smallest unit of work -- a single atomic action. Tasks specify a command (e.g., "UPDATE"), a target field, and a value to set. Tasks can reference standard fields or custom fields. A single Task can be reused across multiple Jobs.

docs.title: Condition
docs.text:
A Condition represents one node in a rule tree. Conditions can be:

  • Leaf nodes: Compare a field against data using an operator (e.g., field: "severity", operator: "==", data: "critical")
  • Branch nodes: Logical groupings (AND, OR) with children arrays containing nested conditions

The is_root flag marks the top-level condition for a Job.

docs.title: Execution Flow
docs.text:
1. A Pipeline is triggered (manually via run or by an event).
  2. Jobs execute in the order defined by jobs_order.
  3. For each Job, the condition tree (rules_json) is evaluated against matching objects.
  4. For every object that satisfies the conditions, each Task in tasks_ids order is executed.
  5. Each execution is recorded as a WorkflowExecution with success/failure status and a message.

docs.title: Pipeline Schema
docs.text:
The Pipeline object represents an ordered workflow containing one or more Jobs.

Property Type Required Read-Only Nullable Description id integer -- Yes No Unique pipeline identifier (auto-generated) name string -- No No Human-readable pipeline name description string -- No Yes Free-text description of the pipeline purpose jobs_order array -- No No Ordered array defining Job execution sequence enabled boolean -- No No Whether the pipeline is active and can be triggered workspace_id integer -- No No ID of the workspace this pipeline is scoped to jobs_ids array of integers -- No No List of Job IDs included in this pipeline running boolean -- Yes No Whether the pipeline is currently executing create_date string (date-time) -- Yes No ISO 8601 timestamp of creation update_date string (date-time) -- Yes No ISO 8601 timestamp of last modification

docs.title: Example Pipeline Object
docs.text:
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns",
  "description": "Automatically confirm and prioritize critical vulnerabilities",
  "jobs_order": [1, 2],
  "enabled": true,
  "workspace_id": 1,
  "jobs_ids": [1, 2],
  "running": false,
  "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:00:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-20T14:30:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Job Schema
docs.text:
The Job object defines a set of conditions and the tasks to execute when those conditions match.

Property Type Required Read-Only Nullable Description id integer -- Yes No Unique job identifier (auto-generated) name string -- No No Human-readable job name description string -- No Yes Free-text description of the job purpose model string Yes No No The resource type this job targets (e.g., "vulnerability", "host", "service") enabled boolean -- No No Whether the job is active rules object -- No Yes Legacy rules object (use rules_json instead) rules_json object Yes No No Structured condition tree defining when this job triggers (see Condition Schema) tasks array -- Yes No Array of Task objects associated with this job (read-only, populated from tasks_ids) pipelines array -- Yes No Array of Pipeline objects that include this job tasks_ids array of integers Yes No No Ordered list of Task IDs to execute when conditions match metadata object -- No Yes Arbitrary metadata key-value pairs create_date string (date-time) -- Yes No ISO 8601 timestamp of creation update_date string (date-time) -- Yes No ISO 8601 timestamp of last modification

docs.title: Example Job Object
docs.text:
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Auto-confirm critical",
  "description": "Automatically confirm vulnerabilities with critical severity",
  "model": "vulnerability",
  "enabled": true,
  "rules": {},
  "rules_json": {
    "type": "AND",
    "is_root": true,
    "children": [
      {
        "type": "leaf",
        "field": "severity",
        "operator": "==",
        "data": "critical"
      }
    ]
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Set confirmed",
      "command": "UPDATE",
      "field": "confirmed",
      "value": "true"
    }
  ],
  "pipelines": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns"
    }
  ],
  "tasks_ids": [1],
  "metadata": {},
  "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:05:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-20T14:30:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Task Schema
docs.text:
The Task (Workflow Task) object defines a single atomic action to perform on a matched object.

Property Type Required Read-Only Nullable Description id integer -- Yes No Unique task identifier (auto-generated) name string -- No No Human-readable task name description string -- No Yes Free-text description of the task command string Yes No No The action command to execute (e.g., "UPDATE", "DELETE", "ALERT") field string -- No Yes Target field name to act upon (e.g., "confirmed", "severity", "status") value string -- No Yes Value to set on the target field custom_field string -- No Yes Name of a custom field to act upon (mutually exclusive with field) job_id integer -- No Yes ID of the owning Job (if directly associated) target string -- No Yes Target scope or qualifier for the action create_date string (date-time) -- Yes No ISO 8601 timestamp of creation update_date string (date-time) -- Yes No ISO 8601 timestamp of last modification

docs.title: Example Task Object
docs.text:
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Set confirmed",
  "description": "Mark vulnerability as confirmed",
  "command": "UPDATE",
  "field": "confirmed",
  "value": "true",
  "custom_field": null,
  "job_id": 1,
  "target": null,
  "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:03:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-15T10:03:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: WorkflowExecution Schema
docs.text:
The WorkflowExecution object records the result of a single Job execution against a specific object.

Property Type Required Read-Only Nullable Description id integer -- Yes No Unique execution record identifier successful boolean Yes No No Whether the execution completed successfully message string Yes No No Human-readable result message or error description object_and_id string Yes No No Identifier of the target object (format: "<type>:<id>", e.g., "vulnerability:42") create_date string (date-time) -- Yes No ISO 8601 timestamp of execution update_date string (date-time) -- Yes No ISO 8601 timestamp of last update

docs.title: Example WorkflowExecution Object
docs.text:
{
  "id": 100,
  "successful": true,
  "message": "Updated field 'confirmed' to 'true' on vulnerability 42",
  "object_and_id": "vulnerability:42",
  "create_date": "2026-02-20T14:31:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-20T14:31:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Condition Schema
docs.text:
The Condition object represents a single node in a Job's rule tree.

Property Type Required Read-Only Nullable Description id integer -- Yes No Unique condition identifier type string Yes No No Node type: "AND", "OR" (branch), or "leaf" (comparison) parent_id integer -- No Yes ID of the parent condition (null for root) children array -- No No Array of child Condition objects (for branch nodes) field string -- No Yes Object field to compare (leaf nodes only, e.g., "severity", "confirmed") operator string -- No Yes Comparison operator (leaf nodes only, e.g., "==", "!=", ">", "<", ">=", "<=", "in", "like") data string -- No Yes Value to compare against (leaf nodes only) job_id integer -- No Yes ID of the Job this condition belongs to is_root boolean -- No No Whether this is the top-level condition node for its Job create_date string (date-time) -- Yes No ISO 8601 timestamp of creation update_date string (date-time) -- Yes No ISO 8601 timestamp of last modification

docs.title: Example Condition Tree
docs.text:
{
  "id": 1,
  "type": "AND",
  "is_root": true,
  "parent_id": null,
  "job_id": 1,
  "children": [
    {
      "id": 2,
      "type": "leaf",
      "field": "severity",
      "operator": "==",
      "data": "critical",
      "parent_id": 1,
      "children": [],
      "is_root": false
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "type": "leaf",
      "field": "confirmed",
      "operator": "==",
      "data": "false",
      "parent_id": 1,
      "children": [],
      "is_root": false
    }
  ]
}

docs.title: Pipeline Endpoints
docs.text:
Base Path: /_api/v3/pipelines Total Endpoints: 11

# Method Path Summary 1 GET /_api/v3/pipelines List all pipelines 2 POST /_api/v3/pipelines Create a new pipeline 3 GET /_api/v3/pipelines/{object_id} Get a pipeline by ID 4 PUT /_api/v3/pipelines/{object_id} Full update of a pipeline 5 PATCH /_api/v3/pipelines/{object_id} Partial update of a pipeline 6 DELETE /_api/v3/pipelines/{object_id} Delete a pipeline 7 GET /_api/v3/pipelines/{pipeline_id}/export Export pipeline as JSON 8 POST /_api/v3/pipelines/{pipeline_id}/clone Clone a pipeline 9 POST /_api/v3/pipelines/{pipeline_id}/run Run all jobs in a pipeline 10 POST /_api/v3/pipelines/{pipeline_id}/disable Disable a pipeline 11 POST /_api/v3/pipelines/{pipeline_id}/enable Enable a pipeline

docs.title: 1. List Pipelines
docs.text:
Retrieve a paginated list of all pipelines accessible to the authenticated user.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/pipelines Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Query Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Default Description page integer 0 Page number (0-indexed) page_size integer 20 Number of results per page sort string -- Field name to sort by (e.g., name, create_date) sort_dir string asc Sort direction: asc or desc

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Array of Pipeline objects

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
# List all pipelines
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines

[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns",
    "description": "Automatically confirm and prioritize critical vulnerabilities",
    "jobs_order": [1, 2],
    "enabled": true,
    "workspace_id": 1,
    "jobs_ids": [1, 2],
    "running": false,
    "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:00:00+00:00",
    "update_date": "2026-02-20T14:30:00+00:00"
  },
  {
    "id": 2,
    "name": "Close info-level findings",
    "description": "Automatically close informational vulnerabilities",
    "jobs_order": [3],
    "enabled": true,
    "workspace_id": 1,
    "jobs_ids": [3],
    "running": false,
    "create_date": "2026-02-16T09:00:00+00:00",
    "update_date": "2026-02-16T09:00:00+00:00"
  }
]

# List with pagination and sorting
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  "https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines?page=0&page_size=10&sort=create_date&sort_dir=desc"

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication

docs.title: 2. Create Pipeline
docs.text:
Create a new pipeline. Optionally associate existing Jobs by providing jobs_ids.

Method POST Path /_api/v3/pipelines Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text: Field Type Required Description name string No Pipeline name description string No Pipeline description jobs_ids array of integers No List of Job IDs to include workspace_id integer No Workspace to scope the pipeline to enabled boolean No Active status (default: true)

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 201 Created
  • Body: Created Pipeline object

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Auto-scan pipeline",
    "description": "Pipeline for post-scan automated triage",
    "jobs_ids": [1, 2],
    "workspace_id": 1
  }' \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines

{
  "id": 3,
  "name": "Auto-scan pipeline",
  "description": "Pipeline for post-scan automated triage",
  "jobs_order": [1, 2],
  "enabled": true,
  "workspace_id": 1,
  "jobs_ids": [1, 2],
  "running": false,
  "create_date": "2026-02-27T12:00:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T12:00:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 400 Bad request -- validation error (e.g., invalid jobs_ids reference) 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 403 Forbidden -- insufficient permissions 409 Conflict -- a pipeline with this name already exists in the workspace

docs.title: 3. Get Pipeline
docs.text:
Retrieve a single pipeline by its ID.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/pipelines/{object_id} Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description object_id integer Yes The pipeline ID

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Pipeline object

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines/1

{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns",
  "description": "Automatically confirm and prioritize critical vulnerabilities",
  "jobs_order": [1, 2],
  "enabled": true,
  "workspace_id": 1,
  "jobs_ids": [1, 2],
  "running": false,
  "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:00:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-20T14:30:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no pipeline with the given ID

docs.title: 4. Full Update Pipeline
docs.text:
Replace all fields of an existing pipeline. All writable fields must be provided; omitted fields may be reset to defaults.

Method PUT Path /_api/v3/pipelines/{object_id} Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description object_id integer Yes The pipeline ID

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text:
Complete Pipeline object with all writable fields.

Field Type Required Description name string No Pipeline name description string No Pipeline description jobs_ids array of integers No Updated list of Job IDs jobs_order array No Updated execution order workspace_id integer No Workspace ID enabled boolean No Active status

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Updated Pipeline object

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X PUT \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns",
    "description": "Updated: confirm and tag critical vulnerabilities",
    "jobs_ids": [1, 2, 4],
    "jobs_order": [1, 4, 2],
    "workspace_id": 1,
    "enabled": true
  }' \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines/1

{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns",
  "description": "Updated: confirm and tag critical vulnerabilities",
  "jobs_order": [1, 4, 2],
  "enabled": true,
  "workspace_id": 1,
  "jobs_ids": [1, 2, 4],
  "running": false,
  "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:00:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T12:15:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 400 Bad request -- validation error 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 403 Forbidden -- insufficient permissions 404 Not found -- no pipeline with the given ID 409 Conflict -- pipeline name already taken

docs.title: 5. Partial Update Pipeline
docs.text:
Update one or more fields of an existing pipeline without affecting other fields.

Method PATCH Path /_api/v3/pipelines/{object_id} Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description object_id integer Yes The pipeline ID

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text: A JSON object containing only the fields to update.

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Updated Pipeline object

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
# Update only the description and add a new job
curl -s -X PATCH \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "description": "Now includes medium-severity triage",
    "jobs_ids": [1, 2, 5]
  }' \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines/1

{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns",
  "description": "Now includes medium-severity triage",
  "jobs_order": [1, 2, 5],
  "enabled": true,
  "workspace_id": 1,
  "jobs_ids": [1, 2, 5],
  "running": false,
  "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:00:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T12:20:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 400 Bad request -- validation error 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 403 Forbidden -- insufficient permissions 404 Not found -- no pipeline with the given ID 409 Conflict -- pipeline name already taken

docs.title: 6. Delete Pipeline
docs.text:
Permanently delete a pipeline. Associated Jobs and Tasks are not deleted -- only the pipeline container and its job associations are removed.

Method DELETE Path /_api/v3/pipelines/{object_id} Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description object_id integer Yes The pipeline ID

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 204 No Content
  • Body: Empty

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X DELETE \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines/3

No response body is returned on success.

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 403 Forbidden -- insufficient permissions 404 Not found -- no pipeline with the given ID

docs.title: 7. Export Pipeline
docs.text:
Export a pipeline and all its associated Jobs, Tasks, and Conditions as a self-contained JSON document. Useful for backup, migration, or sharing between Faraday instances.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/pipelines/{pipeline_id}/export Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description pipeline_id integer Yes The pipeline ID to export

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: JSON document containing the full pipeline definition with nested Jobs, Tasks, and Conditions

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines/1/export

{
  "pipeline": {
    "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns",
    "description": "Automatically confirm and prioritize critical vulnerabilities",
    "jobs_order": [1, 2],
    "enabled": true,
    "workspace_id": 1,
    "jobs": [
      {
        "name": "Auto-confirm critical",
        "model": "vulnerability",
        "rules_json": {
          "type": "AND",
          "is_root": true,
          "children": [
            {
              "type": "leaf",
              "field": "severity",
              "operator": "==",
              "data": "critical"
            }
          ]
        },
        "tasks": [
          {
            "name": "Set confirmed",
            "command": "UPDATE",
            "field": "confirmed",
            "value": "true"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no pipeline with the given ID

docs.title: 8. Clone Pipeline
docs.text:
Create a duplicate of an existing pipeline, including copies of all its Job and Task associations. The cloned pipeline receives a new ID and a modified name (e.g., "Original Name (copy)").

Method POST Path /_api/v3/pipelines/{pipeline_id}/clone Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description pipeline_id integer Yes The pipeline ID to clone

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text: None required.

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 201 Created
  • Body: The newly created Pipeline object (clone)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines/1/clone

{
  "id": 4,
  "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns (copy)",
  "description": "Automatically confirm and prioritize critical vulnerabilities",
  "jobs_order": [1, 2],
  "enabled": false,
  "workspace_id": 1,
  "jobs_ids": [1, 2],
  "running": false,
  "create_date": "2026-02-27T12:30:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T12:30:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no pipeline with the given ID

docs.title: 9. Run Pipeline
docs.text:
Trigger immediate execution of all Jobs in the pipeline, following the order defined in jobs_order. The pipeline's running status will be set to true during execution.

Method POST Path /_api/v3/pipelines/{pipeline_id}/run Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description pipeline_id integer Yes The pipeline ID to run

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text: None required.

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Confirmation message with execution status

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines/1/run

{
  "message": "Pipeline execution started",
  "pipeline_id": 1
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 400 Bad request -- pipeline is disabled or already running 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 403 Forbidden -- insufficient permissions 404 Not found -- no pipeline with the given ID

docs.title: 10. Disable Pipeline
docs.text:
Set a pipeline's enabled status to false. Disabled pipelines will not execute when triggered.

Method POST Path /_api/v3/pipelines/{pipeline_id}/disable Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description pipeline_id integer Yes The pipeline ID to disable

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text: None required.

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Updated Pipeline object with enabled: false

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines/1/disable

{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns",
  "description": "Automatically confirm and prioritize critical vulnerabilities",
  "jobs_order": [1, 2],
  "enabled": false,
  "workspace_id": 1,
  "jobs_ids": [1, 2],
  "running": false,
  "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:00:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T12:40:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no pipeline with the given ID

docs.title: 11. Enable Pipeline
docs.text:
Set a pipeline's enabled status to true. Enabled pipelines can be triggered manually or by events.

Method POST Path /_api/v3/pipelines/{pipeline_id}/enable Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description pipeline_id integer Yes The pipeline ID to enable

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text: None required.

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Updated Pipeline object with enabled: true

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/pipelines/1/enable

{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns",
  "description": "Automatically confirm and prioritize critical vulnerabilities",
  "jobs_order": [1, 2],
  "enabled": true,
  "workspace_id": 1,
  "jobs_ids": [1, 2],
  "running": false,
  "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:00:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T12:45:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no pipeline with the given ID

docs.title: Job Endpoints
docs.text:
Base Path: /_api/v3/jobs Total Endpoints: 14

# Method Path Summary 1 GET /_api/v3/jobs List all jobs 2 POST /_api/v3/jobs Create a new job 3 GET /_api/v3/jobs/{object_id} Get a job by ID 4 PUT /_api/v3/jobs/{object_id} Full update of a job 5 PATCH /_api/v3/jobs/{object_id} Partial update of a job 6 DELETE /_api/v3/jobs/{object_id} Delete a job 7 GET /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/executions Get execution history 8 GET /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/tasks Get tasks for a job 9 GET /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/conditions Get conditions for a job 10 GET /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/enabled Check if job is enabled 11 GET /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/export_job Export job as JSON 12 POST /_api/v3/jobs/import_job Import job from JSON 13 GET /_api/v3/jobs/rules/attributes Get available rule attributes 14 POST /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/clone Clone a job

docs.title: 1. List Jobs
docs.text:
Retrieve a paginated list of all jobs.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/jobs Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Query Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Default Description page integer 0 Page number (0-indexed) page_size integer 20 Number of results per page sort string -- Field name to sort by sort_dir string asc Sort direction: asc or desc

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Array of Job objects

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs

[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Auto-confirm critical",
    "description": "Automatically confirm vulnerabilities with critical severity",
    "model": "vulnerability",
    "enabled": true,
    "rules": {},
    "rules_json": {
      "type": "AND",
      "is_root": true,
      "children": [
        {
          "type": "leaf",
          "field": "severity",
          "operator": "==",
          "data": "critical"
        }
      ]
    },
    "tasks": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Set confirmed",
        "command": "UPDATE",
        "field": "confirmed",
        "value": "true"
      }
    ],
    "pipelines": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns"
      }
    ],
    "tasks_ids": [1],
    "metadata": {},
    "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:05:00+00:00",
    "update_date": "2026-02-20T14:30:00+00:00"
  }
]

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication

docs.title: 2. Create Job
docs.text:
Create a new job with conditions and task associations.

Method POST Path /_api/v3/jobs Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text: Field Type Required Description name string No Job name description string No Job description model string Yes Target resource type (e.g., "vulnerability", "host", "service") rules_json object Yes Condition tree defining when this job triggers (see Condition Schema) tasks_ids array of integers Yes Ordered list of Task IDs to execute enabled boolean No Active status (default: true) metadata object No Arbitrary metadata

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 201 Created
  • Body: Created Job object

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Auto-confirm critical",
    "description": "Confirm all critical severity vulnerabilities automatically",
    "model": "vulnerability",
    "rules_json": {
      "type": "AND",
      "is_root": true,
      "children": [
        {
          "type": "leaf",
          "field": "severity",
          "operator": "==",
          "data": "critical"
        },
        {
          "type": "leaf",
          "field": "confirmed",
          "operator": "==",
          "data": "false"
        }
      ]
    },
    "tasks_ids": [1]
  }' \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs

{
  "id": 5,
  "name": "Auto-confirm critical",
  "description": "Confirm all critical severity vulnerabilities automatically",
  "model": "vulnerability",
  "enabled": true,
  "rules": {},
  "rules_json": {
    "type": "AND",
    "is_root": true,
    "children": [
      {
        "type": "leaf",
        "field": "severity",
        "operator": "==",
        "data": "critical"
      },
      {
        "type": "leaf",
        "field": "confirmed",
        "operator": "==",
        "data": "false"
      }
    ]
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Set confirmed",
      "command": "UPDATE",
      "field": "confirmed",
      "value": "true"
    }
  ],
  "pipelines": [],
  "tasks_ids": [1],
  "metadata": {},
  "create_date": "2026-02-27T13:00:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T13:00:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 400 Bad request -- validation error (e.g., missing model, rules_json, or tasks_ids; invalid task ID reference) 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 403 Forbidden -- insufficient permissions

docs.title: 4. Full Update Job

Replace all fields of an existing job. All required fields must be provided.

Method PUT Path /_api/v3/jobs/{object_id} Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

Complete Job object with all required and writable fields.

Field Type Required Description name string No Job name description string No Job description model string Yes Target resource type rules_json object Yes Updated condition tree tasks_ids array of integers Yes Updated task list enabled boolean No Active status metadata object No Arbitrary metadata

docs.title: 5. Partial Update Job
docs.text:
Update one or more fields of an existing job without affecting other fields.

Method PATCH Path /_api/v3/jobs/{object_id} Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description object_id integer Yes The job ID

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text: A JSON object containing only the fields to update.

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Updated Job object

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
# Disable a job and update its description
curl -s -X PATCH \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "enabled": false,
    "description": "Temporarily disabled for review"
  }' \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs/1

{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Auto-confirm critical and high",
  "description": "Temporarily disabled for review",
  "model": "vulnerability",
  "enabled": false,
  "rules": {},
  "rules_json": {
    "type": "OR",
    "is_root": true,
    "children": [
      {
        "type": "leaf",
        "field": "severity",
        "operator": "==",
        "data": "critical"
      },
      {
        "type": "leaf",
        "field": "severity",
        "operator": "==",
        "data": "high"
      }
    ]
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Set confirmed",
      "command": "UPDATE",
      "field": "confirmed",
      "value": "true"
    }
  ],
  "pipelines": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Auto-triage critical vulns"
    }
  ],
  "tasks_ids": [1],
  "metadata": {},
  "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:05:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T13:15:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 400 Bad request -- validation error 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 403 Forbidden -- insufficient permissions 404 Not found -- no job with the given ID

docs.title: 6. Delete Job
docs.text:
Permanently delete a job. The job is removed from any associated Pipelines. Tasks referenced by the job are not deleted.

Method DELETE Path /_api/v3/jobs/{object_id} Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description object_id integer Yes The job ID

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 204 No Content
  • Body: Empty

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X DELETE \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs/5

No response body is returned on success.

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 403 Forbidden -- insufficient permissions 404 Not found -- no job with the given ID

docs.title: 7. Get Job Executions
docs.text:
Retrieve the execution history for a specific job. Returns an array of WorkflowExecution objects showing which objects were acted upon and whether each execution succeeded.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/executions Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description job_id integer Yes The job ID

docs.title: Query Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Default Description page integer 0 Page number (0-indexed) page_size integer 20 Number of results per page

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Array of WorkflowExecution objects

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs/1/executions

[
  {
    "id": 100,
    "successful": true,
    "message": "Updated field 'confirmed' to 'true' on vulnerability 42",
    "object_and_id": "vulnerability:42",
    "create_date": "2026-02-20T14:31:00+00:00",
    "update_date": "2026-02-20T14:31:00+00:00"
  },
  {
    "id": 101,
    "successful": true,
    "message": "Updated field 'confirmed' to 'true' on vulnerability 87",
    "object_and_id": "vulnerability:87",
    "create_date": "2026-02-20T14:31:01+00:00",
    "update_date": "2026-02-20T14:31:01+00:00"
  },
  {
    "id": 102,
    "successful": false,
    "message": "Failed to update vulnerability 99: object not found",
    "object_and_id": "vulnerability:99",
    "create_date": "2026-02-20T14:31:02+00:00",
    "update_date": "2026-02-20T14:31:02+00:00"
  }
]

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no job with the given ID

docs.title: 8. Get Job Tasks
docs.text:
Retrieve the list of tasks associated with a specific job, in execution order.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/tasks Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description job_id integer Yes The job ID

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Array of Task objects

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs/1/tasks

[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Set confirmed",
    "description": "Mark vulnerability as confirmed",
    "command": "UPDATE",
    "field": "confirmed",
    "value": "true",
    "custom_field": null,
    "job_id": 1,
    "target": null,
    "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:03:00+00:00",
    "update_date": "2026-02-15T10:03:00+00:00"
  }
]

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no job with the given ID

docs.title: 9. Get Job Conditions
docs.text:
Retrieve the condition/rule tree for a specific job. Returns an array of Condition objects representing the full rule hierarchy.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/conditions Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description job_id integer Yes The job ID

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Array of Condition objects

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs/1/conditions

[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "type": "AND",
    "is_root": true,
    "parent_id": null,
    "job_id": 1,
    "field": null,
    "operator": null,
    "data": null,
    "children": [
      {
        "id": 2,
        "type": "leaf",
        "is_root": false,
        "parent_id": 1,
        "job_id": 1,
        "field": "severity",
        "operator": "==",
        "data": "critical",
        "children": [],
        "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:05:00+00:00",
        "update_date": "2026-02-15T10:05:00+00:00"
      },
      {
        "id": 3,
        "type": "leaf",
        "is_root": false,
        "parent_id": 1,
        "job_id": 1,
        "field": "confirmed",
        "operator": "==",
        "data": "false",
        "children": [],
        "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:05:00+00:00",
        "update_date": "2026-02-15T10:05:00+00:00"
      }
    ],
    "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:05:00+00:00",
    "update_date": "2026-02-15T10:05:00+00:00"

]

docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no job with the given ID

docs.title: 10. Check Job Enabled
docs.text:
Check whether a specific job is currently enabled. Returns a simple boolean status.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/enabled Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description job_id integer Yes The job ID

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: JSON object with enabled status

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs/1/enabled

{
  "enabled": true
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no job with the given ID

docs.title: 11. Export Job
docs.text:
Export a job and all its associated Tasks and Conditions as a self-contained JSON document. Useful for backup, migration, or sharing between Faraday instances.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/export_job Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description job_id integer Yes The job ID to export

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: JSON document containing the full job definition with nested Tasks and Conditions

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs/1/export_job

{
  "job": {
    "name": "Auto-confirm critical",
    "model": "vulnerability",
    "enabled": true,
    "rules_json": {
      "type": "AND",
      "is_root": true,
      "children": [
        {
          "type": "leaf",
          "field": "severity",
          "operator": "==",
          "data": "critical"
        }
      ]
    },
    "tasks": [
      {
        "name": "Set confirmed",
        "command": "UPDATE",
        "field": "confirmed",
        "value": "true"
      }
    ]
  }
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no job with the given ID

docs.title: 12. Import Job
docs.text:
Import a job from a JSON document previously exported via Export Job. Creates a new Job along with its Tasks and Conditions.

Method POST Path /_api/v3/jobs/import_job Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text:
A JSON document in the same format produced by the Export Job endpoint.

Field Type Required Description job object Yes The job definition object containing name, model, rules_json, tasks, etc.

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 201 Created
  • Body: The newly created Job object with new IDs assigned

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "job": {
      "name": "Imported: Auto-confirm critical",
      "model": "vulnerability",
      "enabled": true,
      "rules_json": {
        "type": "AND",
        "is_root": true,
        "children": [
          {
            "type": "leaf",
            "field": "severity",
            "operator": "==",
            "data": "critical"
          }
        ]
      },
      "tasks": [
        {
          "name": "Set confirmed",
          "command": "UPDATE",
          "field": "confirmed",
          "value": "true"
        }
      ]
    }
  }' \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs/import_job

{
  "id": 6,
  "name": "Imported: Auto-confirm critical",
  "description": null,
  "model": "vulnerability",
  "enabled": true,
  "rules": {},
  "rules_json": {
    "type": "AND",
    "is_root": true,
    "children": [
      {
        "type": "leaf",
        "field": "severity",
        "operator": "==",
        "data": "critical"
      }
    ]
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": 10,
      "name": "Set confirmed",
      "command": "UPDATE",
      "field": "confirmed",
      "value": "true"
    }
  ],
  "pipelines": [],
  "tasks_ids": [10],
  "metadata": {},
  "create_date": "2026-02-27T13:30:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T13:30:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 400 Bad request -- invalid import JSON structure or missing required fields 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 403 Forbidden -- insufficient permissions

docs.title: 13. Get Rule Attributes
docs.text:
Retrieve the list of available field attributes that can be used in Job condition rules, grouped by model type. This endpoint is useful for dynamically building rule conditions in a UI.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/jobs/rules/attributes Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Query Parameters
docs.text: None.

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Object mapping model types to arrays of available rule attributes

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs/rules/attributes

{
  "vulnerability": [
    {
      "name": "severity",
      "type": "string",
      "operators": ["==", "!=", "in"],
      "values": ["critical", "high", "medium", "low", "informational", "unclassified"]
    },
    {
      "name": "confirmed",
      "type": "boolean",
      "operators": ["==", "!="],
      "values": ["true", "false"]
    },
    {
      "name": "status",
      "type": "string",
      "operators": ["==", "!=", "in"],
      "values": ["open", "closed", "re-opened", "risk-accepted"]
    },
    {
      "name": "name",
      "type": "string",
      "operators": ["==", "!=", "like"]
    },
    {
      "name": "description",
      "type": "string",
      "operators": ["==", "!=", "like"]
    }
  ],
  "host": [
    {
      "name": "os",
      "type": "string",
      "operators": ["==", "!=", "like"]
    },
    {
      "name": "ip",
      "type": "string",
      "operators": ["==", "!=", "like"]
    }
  ],
  "service": [
    {
      "name": "name",
      "type": "string",
      "operators": ["==", "!=", "like"]
    },
    {
      "name": "port",
      "type": "integer",
      "operators": ["==", "!=", ">", "<", ">=", "<="]
    },
    {
      "name": "protocol",
      "type": "string",
      "operators": ["==", "!="],
      "values": ["tcp", "udp"]
    }
  ]
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication

docs.title: 14. Clone Job
docs.text:
Create a duplicate of an existing job, including copies of its condition rules and task associations. The cloned job receives a new ID and a modified name.

Method POST Path /_api/v3/jobs/{job_id}/clone Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description job_id integer Yes The job ID to clone

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text: None required.

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 201 Created
  • Body: The newly created Job object (clone)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/jobs/1/clone

{
  "id": 7,
  "name": "Auto-confirm critical (copy)",
  "description": "Automatically confirm vulnerabilities with critical severity",
  "model": "vulnerability",
  "enabled": false,
  "rules": {},
  "rules_json": {
    "type": "AND",
    "is_root": true,
    "children": [
      {
        "type": "leaf",
        "field": "severity",
        "operator": "==",
        "data": "critical"
      }
    ]
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Set confirmed",
      "command": "UPDATE",
      "field": "confirmed",
      "value": "true"
    }
  ],
  "pipelines": [],
  "tasks_ids": [1],
  "metadata": {},
  "create_date": "2026-02-27T13:40:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T13:40:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: Status Description 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 404 Not found -- no job with the given ID

docs.title: Task Endpoints
docs.text:
Base Path: /_api/v3/tasks Total Endpoints: 8

# Method Path Summary 1 GET /_api/v3/tasks List all tasks 2 POST /_api/v3/tasks Create a new task 3 GET /_api/v3/tasks/{object_id} Get a task by ID 4 PUT /_api/v3/tasks/{object_id} Full update of a task 5 PATCH /_api/v3/tasks/{object_id} Partial update of a task 6 DELETE /_api/v3/tasks/{object_id} Delete a task 7 GET /_api/v3/tasks/{task_id}/jobs List jobs using this task 8 GET /_api/v3/tasks/fields Get available task action fields

docs.title: 1. List Tasks
docs.text:
Retrieve a paginated list of all workflow tasks.

Method GET Path /_api/v3/tasks Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Array of Task objects

curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \

docs.title: 2. Create Task
docs.text:
Create a new workflow task defining an atomic action.

Method POST Path /_api/v3/tasks Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text: Field Type Required Description name string No Task name description string No Task description command string Yes Action command (e.g., "UPDATE", "DELETE", "ALERT") field string No Target standard field (e.g., "confirmed", "severity", "status") value string No Value to set custom_field string No Target custom field name (mutually exclusive with field) target string No Target scope or qualifier

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 201 Created
  • Body: Created Task object

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Set confirmed",
    "description": "Mark vulnerability as confirmed",
    "command": "UPDATE",
    "field": "confirmed",
    "value": "true"
  }' \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/tasks

{
  "id": 4,
  "name": "Set confirmed",
  "description": "Mark vulnerability as confirmed",
  "command": "UPDATE",
  "field": "confirmed",
  "value": "true",
  "custom_field": null,
  "job_id": null,
  "target": null,
  "create_date": "2026-02-27T14:00:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T14:00:00+00:00"
}

# Create a task that updates a custom field
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Set priority custom field",
    "command": "UPDATE",
    "custom_field": "priority_score",
    "value": "10"
  }' \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/tasks

{
  "id": 5,
  "name": "Set priority custom field",
  "description": null,
  "command": "UPDATE",
  "field": null,
  "value": "10",
  "custom_field": "priority_score",
  "job_id": null,
  "target": null,
  "create_date": "2026-02-27T14:05:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T14:05:00+00:00"
}

docs.title: 4. Full Update Task
docs.text:
Replace all fields of an existing task. The command field is required.

Method PUT Path /_api/v3/tasks/{object_id} Authentication Required (session cookie or API token)

docs.title: Path Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description object_id integer Yes The task ID

docs.title: Request Body
docs.text:
Complete Task object with all writable fields.

Field Type Required Description name string No Task name description string No Task description command string Yes Action command field string No Target standard field value string No Value to set custom_field string No Target custom field name target string No Target scope

docs.title: Response
docs.text:
• Status: 200 OK
  • Body: Updated Task object

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
curl -s -X PUT \
  -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Set confirmed and tag",
    "description": "Mark vulnerability as confirmed",
    "command": "UPDATE",
    "field": "confirmed",
    "value": "true"
  }' \
  https://localhost:5985/_api/v3/tasks/1

{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Set confirmed and tag",
  "description": "Mark vulnerability as confirmed",
  "command": "UPDATE",
  "field": "confirmed",
  "value": "true",
  "custom_field": null,
  "job_id": 1,
  "target": null,
  "create_date": "2026-02-15T10:03:00+00:00",
  "update_date": "2026-02-27T14:10:00+00:00"
}

docs.text: Status Description 400 Bad request -- validation error (e.g., missing command) 401 Unauthorized -- missing or invalid authentication 403 Forbidden -- insufficient permissions 404 Not found -- no task with the given ID

docs.title: 5. Partial Update Task
docs.text:
Update one or more fields of an existing task without affecting other fields.
